chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 518 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «ثَوَابُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ مِنْ وَلَدِهِ إِذَا مَاتَ اَلْجَنَّةُ صَبَرَ أَوْ لَمْ يَصْبِرْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.518 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The reward for a believer whose child dies is Paradise, whether they exhibit patience or not”.
